statement: In every magma, Equation 811 (`x = y * (z * ((w * u) * x))`) implies Equation 4642 (`(x * y) * x = (z * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0781
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w u) x)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op (op x y) x) = (op (op z x) x)
